eventSummary:
Reports indicate that Iranian hackers have allegedly threatened to target U.S. financial data, specifically claiming intent to wipe debt and credit score records. This threat surfaces amidst a broader context of Iran-linked cyber activities targeting various international entities.
Sources:
- https://twitter.com/4874513699/status/2032951549131936079
- https://twitter.com/41258937/status/2032842690014896623
